name: NAC Nueva Alcántara
address: Av. de Barcelona, 8, 29670 San Pedro Alcántara, Málaga
description: Voted World's Best Padel Club in both 2024 and 2025, NAC Nueva Alcántara is the benchmark for padel excellence on the Costa del Sol. All 16 panoramic glass-walled courts are built to World Padel Tour standards, surrounded by lush gardens and mountain views. The club offers a fine dining restaurant, physiotherapy centre, fully-stocked pro shop, and one of the most active tournament calendars on the coast.

name: Puente Romano Tennis & Padel
description: One of the most exclusive addresses in European padel, Puente Romano's courts are set within the legendary Golden Mile resort where professional players and celebrities come to train. Four premium outdoor courts are complemented by a world-class coaching academy, Michelin-starred dining, and direct beach access — making every game feel like an event in itself.

name: Real Club Padel Marbella
address: C. Río Amazonas, s/n, 29660 Marbella, Málaga
description: Marbella's most vibrant padel community. Real Club Padel Marbella combines six next-generation courts with an on-site gym, spa, and one of the most active social calendars of any club on the coast. Weekly leagues, ladies' sessions, and junior development programmes run year-round, making this the natural choice for players who want great padel and great company.

name: Manolo Santana Racquets Club
address: Carretera de Istán, km 2, 29602 Nueva Andalucía, Marbella
description: Named in honour of Spain's greatest tennis legend, this prestigious club in Nueva Andalucía's Golf Valley offers four padel courts alongside six competition tennis courts. Regular clinics from WPT-certified coaches, a relaxed clubhouse atmosphere, and an international member community make Manolo Santana one of the most social clubs on the coast.

name: Los Monteros Racket Club
address: Calle del Lince, Urb. Los Monteros, 29603 Marbella, Málaga
description: Tucked within the exclusive Los Monteros estate east of Marbella town, this elegant racket club offers six glass padel courts in a tranquil beachside setting. Popular with residents of the surrounding villas and guests at the Kimpton Los Monteros hotel, the club has a laid-back members feel with friendly staff and competitive rates for such a prestigious postcode.

name: Los Naranjos Padel Club
address: Av. Valle Inclán, 41, 29660 Nueva Andalucía, Marbella
description: The largest padel club in Andalusia, just five minutes from Puerto Banús marina. Los Naranjos boasts 18 courts across indoor and outdoor settings — including one World Padel Tour competition court, four fully covered indoor courts, and a dedicated solo practice facility. With a professional coaching academy and two pickleball courts added in 2024, this is the most comprehensive padel destination on the Costa del Sol.

name: Villa Padierna Racquet Club
address: Calle Adriano, Urb. Costalita, 29688 Estepona, Málaga
description: The most luxurious padel experience on the Costa del Sol. Fifteen courts spread across three stunning areas within the grounds of the five-star Villa Padierna Palace hotel. Five-star service extends to every aspect of play — private coaching, bespoke racket fitting, and post-match spa treatments are all on offer. The dramatic backdrop of the Benahavis hills makes every visit genuinely unforgettable.

name: Club de Padel Nueva Alcántara
address: N-340 km 171.5, San Pedro de Alcántara, 29670 Marbella
description: One of the original padel clubs in San Pedro Alcántara, this well-established venue offers eleven outdoor courts alongside four tennis courts and a gym. Prices are among the most competitive in the Marbella area, and the friendly atmosphere attracts a loyal community of local regulars. Regular social tournaments and beginner programmes run throughout the year.

name: Club de Tenis y Padel Estepona
address: Urb. Forest Hills, Calle Sidney, s/n, 29680 Estepona, Málaga
description: Estepona's premier racket sports club, offering six World Padel Tour-standard courts in a well-maintained residential setting. The club hosts several Federated tournaments each season and runs a respected coaching academy for players from beginner to advanced. With highly competitive rates and easy access from the western end of the Costa del Sol, it's a favourite for both locals and visitors to Estepona.
